zh.Friars Minors, Worcester, Worcestershire: 英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh.Northampton, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Archdeacon於1383年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德時，她的父親Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne23歲，母親Elizabeth Talbot20歲。她於1400年之前與Sir Walter Lucy在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1447年7月20日在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

zh-hans.Friars Minors, Worcester, Worcestershire: 英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh-hans.Northampton, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Archdeacon于1383年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德时，她的父亲Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne23岁，母亲Elizabeth Talbot20岁。她于1400年之前与Sir Walter Lucy在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1447年7月20日在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Archdeacon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English ercedeken ‘archdeacon’ (Old English ercedīacon, Old French arc(h)ediacne), probably denoting someone in the service of an archdeacon.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Archdeacon was born in 1383, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne, was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth Talbot, was 20. She married Sir Walter Lucy before 1400, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 20 July 1447, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Archdeacon est née en 1383, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Talbot, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Lucy avant 1400, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1447, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Archdeacon 1383 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne 23 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Talbot 20. Sie hat vor 1400 in England Sir Walter Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1447 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Worcester, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Archdeacon è nata il nel 1383 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Talbot, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Lucy prima del 1400, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1447, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Archdeaconが1383年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekneは23歳，母Elizabeth Talbotは20歳であった。1400年以前にイギリスでSir Walter Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1447年7月20日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで64歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Archdeacon(이)가 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Talbot(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1400년 이전 영국에서 Sir Walter Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1447년 7월 20일 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Archdeacon nasceu em 1383, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Talbot, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Lucy antes 1400, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de julho de 1447, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Archdeacon родилась в 1383 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Talbot, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Lucy перед 1400 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 июля 1447 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Archdeacon nació en 1383, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Warin L' Arcedekne 3rd Lord Arcedekne, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Talbot, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Lucy antes de 1400, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1447, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
